name: Malice Ascendant
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>増</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>幅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>する<ruby lang="jp"><rb>悪意</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your opponent's Standby Phase, send 1 card from the top of their Deck to the Graveyard for each "Malice Ascendant" in your Graveyard.
mnst_eff: During your opponent's Standby Phase, send 1 card from the top of their Deck to the Graveyard for each "Malice Ascendant" in your Graveyard.
eff: During your opponent's Standby Phase, send 1 card from the top of their Deck to the Graveyard for each "Malice Ascendant" in your Graveyard.

action: Sends from the top of your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
